situation: storage.py used abs(hash(tuple))%10**12 for primary keys across memories/interventions/events/reminders/wiki_pages. Python hash() is PYTHONHASHSEED-dependent (~40bit space), causing cross-process non-idempotency and collision risk under load. INSERT OR REPLACE semantics break when the same logical record hashes differently across restarts.
action: Added _make_id(prefix, *parts) helper using sha256(parts)[:16] hex for content-bearing inputs (stable, 64bit entropy) and uuid4 fallback for empty inputs. Replaced all 5 call sites in storage.py (add_memory/add_intervention/add_event/add_reminder/add_wiki_page). Verified stability by invoking helper twice with identical input — same output; different input — different output; empty input — unique uuid4 each call.
outcome_evidence: commit afb90b8 on auto/opt-personal-assistant-1782909325; python import test passed; main working tree restored clean
